---
title: "{{< meta course.title >}}"
---

<!--
    ![Course Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/Current%20course--{{< meta course.semester >}}-green)
    [![Level](https://img.shields.io/badge/Level-{{< meta course.level >}}-blue)](syllabus.html)
    [![Degree Program](https://img.shields.io/badge/Degree%20Program-Master%20in%20Management-blue)](syllabus.html)
    [![Prerequisites](https://img.shields.io/badge/Prerequisites-Good%20Knowledge%20in%20Statistics-blue)](syllabus.html)
    ![Duration](https://img.shields.io/badge/Work%20load-150h%20(6%20ECTS)-blue)<br>
    [![Language](https://img.shields.io/badge/Language-{{< meta course.language >}}-blue)](syllabus.html)
    [![Format](https://img.shields.io/badge/Format-Lecture%20%2B%20Exercises-blue)](syllabus.html)
    ![License: CC BY 4.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC%20BY%204.0-green.svg)

    Welcome to {{< meta course.title >}}.
-->

::: {.callout-important}
This repository does not contain slides.
Slides are on [nextcloud](https://nc-2272638881871040784.nextcloud-ionos.com/index.php/apps/files/files/1842250?dir=/teaching/materials/Introduction_to_Programming).
:::

## Sessions

::: {.callout-important title="TODO"}
- Document with instructions to configure Excel (language, separators)? PR: available in canvas? Plan how to present (slide?)
- Detailed learning objectives (TBD: share at the end as "relevant for the exam"?)
- **My VM Excel version does not support XLOOKUP** (TODO: update the formula in Excel_in_class_exercises.xlsx sheet Grading F17)
:::

See [objectives](objectives.qmd)

Orga: see [slides](slides/session_00_orga.qmd)

| Session | Focus         | Title                                                | Slides  | Teaching notes                |
| ------- | ------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | ------- | ----------------------------- |
| 1       | Excel         | Basics, formulas, charts, and conditional structures | 1–28    | [Notes](notes/session_01.qmd) |
| 2       | Excel         | Lookups and tables                                   | 29–52   | [Notes](notes/session_02.qmd) |
| 3       | Excel         | Pivot tables                                         | 53–77   | [Notes](notes/session_03.qmd) |
| 4       | Python/Pandas | Python and pandas basics                             | 1–22    | [Notes](notes/session_04.qmd) |
| 5       | Python/Pandas | Data access and manipulation                         | 23–36   | [Notes](notes/session_05.qmd) |
|         | Exam          | Mid-term exam: Excel                                 |         |                               |
| 6       | Python/Pandas | Statistics, charts, and grouping                     | 37–56   | [Notes](notes/session_06.qmd) |
| 7       | Python        | Pivoting, prediction, and data types                 | 57–86   | [Notes](notes/session_07.qmd) |
| 8       | Python        | Sequences and conditionals                           | 87–108  | [Notes](notes/session_08.qmd) |
| 9       | Python        | For and while loops                                  | 109–114 | [Notes](notes/session_09.qmd) |
| 10      | Python        | Loop control, functions, and dictionaries            | 115–133 | [Notes](notes/session_10.qmd) |
| 11      | Python        | Pandas automation and web APIs                       | 134–159 | [Notes](notes/session_11.qmd) |
|         | Exam          | Final exams                                          |         |                               |

Exam prep/questions: [slide deck](slides/session_exam_prep.qmd)

<!--
        ```{python}
        #| echo: false
        #| output: asis
        from scripts.session_overview import markdown_table
        print(markdown_table())
        ```
-->

## Groups

| Date       | E3                                           | E4                                           | E5                                           |
| ---------- | --------- | --------- | --------- |
| Mon, 2026-09-07 | <span class="session-chip session-01">Session 01</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T6 A |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-01">Session 01</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 A          |
| Tue, 2026-09-08 | <span class="session-chip session-02">Session 02</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T6 A | <span class="session-chip session-01">Session 01</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 A |                                                                                                              |
| Wed, 2026-09-09 |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-02">Session 02</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 B | <span class="session-chip session-02">Session 02</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T7 A          |
| Wed, 2026-09-16 | <span class="session-chip session-03">Session 03</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 A | <span class="session-chip session-03">Session 03</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T7 A |                                                                                                              |
| Wed, 2026-09-23 |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-04">Session 04</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T6 A | <span class="session-chip session-03">Session 03</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 B          |
| Wed, 2026-09-30 | <span class="session-chip session-04">Session 04</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T6 A |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-04">Session 04</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 A          |
| Thu, 2026-10-08 | <span class="session-chip session-05">Session 05</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 A |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-05">Session 05</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T6 B          |
| Fri, 2026-10-09 |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-05">Session 05</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 A |                                                                                                              |
| Mon, 2026-10-26 |                                                                                                     |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-06">Session 06</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T7 A          |
| Tue, 2026-10-27 | <span class="session-chip session-06">Session 06</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T6 A | <span class="session-chip session-06">Session 06</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 B |                                                                                                              |
| Mon, 2026-11-02 |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-07">Session 07</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 A |                                                                                                              |
| Tue, 2026-11-03 | <span class="session-chip session-07">Session 07</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T6 A |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-07">Session 07</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 B          |
| Mon, 2026-11-09 | <span class="session-chip session-08">Session 08</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 A | <span class="session-chip session-08">Session 08</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T6 A |                                                                                                              |
| Tue, 2026-11-10 |                                                                                                     |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-08">Session 08</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T8 A          |
| Mon, 2026-11-16 |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-09">Session 09</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 A | <span class="session-chip session-09">Session 09</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T7 A          |
| Thu, 2026-11-19 | <span class="session-chip session-09">Session 09</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 A |                                                                                                     |                                                                                                              |
| Mon, 2026-11-23 |                                                                                                     |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-10">Session 10</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T7 B          |
| Tue, 2026-11-24 | <span class="session-chip session-10">Session 10</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: T6 B | <span class="session-chip session-10">Session 10</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T8 A |                                                                                                              |
| Thu, 2026-12-03 |                                                                                                     | <span class="session-chip session-11">Session 11</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T6 A | <span class="session-chip session-11">Session 11</span><br>14:00–15:30<br>15:45–17:15<br>Room: tbc BSc tower |
| Fri, 2026-12-04 | <span class="session-chip session-11">Session 11</span><br>09:30–11:00<br>11:15–12:45<br>Room: T6 A |                                                                                                     |                                                                                                              |
